allow: Bash(py -c "import db; db.init_db\(\); db.init_orders_table\(\); import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('database/superdatabase.db'\); print\('orders rows:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM orders'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\); print\('products rows:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM products'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)")
